title: SSE (Server-Sent Events)
description: Implement Server-Sent Events (SSE) for unidirectional real-time updates. Evaluate SSE as an HTTP-native streaming alternative to WebSockets for specific use cases. Compare the complexity and capabilities of SSE versus WebSocket implementations.
objectives: Implement Server-Sent Events (SSE) for unidirectional real-time updates.
Evaluate SSE as an HTTP-native streaming alternative to WebSockets for specific use cases.
Compare the complexity and capabilities of SSE versus WebSocket implementations.
